sources.title: Aperçu des cotisations aux assurances sociales
used_for: Employee and employer social contribution split

sources.title: Financement de la prévoyance professionnelle
used_for: Methodological limits of standardized pension assumptions

sources.title: Barèmes de l'impôt à la source pour l'importation dans les systèmes de comptabilité salariale
used_for: Future integration of net after withholding tax by canton

notes: The first Swiss prototype separates national social contributions from canton-level fiscal parameters.
Withholding-tax integration will be implemented in a second step using official cantonal files.
The module uses benchmark assumptions for occupational pension and accident insurance because actual employer schemes vary.
